overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Harry Potter-style RPG showing a robed character entering a dungeon potions classroom. The environment features gothic stone vaulting, warm lantern lighting, wooden tables with cauldrons, and other students in robes. The video transitions from a third-person follow shot in a corridor to a stationary wide shot of the classroom interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone dungeon corridor leading to classroom

events.description: character walks through stone archway from corridor into the potions classroom

agents.ego_description: robed character walking forward through the stone corridor toward the classroom entrance

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone wall of the dungeon corridor
gothic stone archway leading into the lit classroom

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character in dark robes walking through a narrow, dimly lit stone dungeon corridor. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches a stone archway leading into a brighter space.

scene_state.functional_zone: potions classroom with worktables and cauldrons

events.description: Learn Potions UI text appears in the bottom left corner of the screen
robed student enters from the left and walks across the room
second robed student enters and walks through the classroom

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the potions classroom environment after entering

notable_agents.action: robed student walking from left side of the room toward the center tables

entered.detail: high gothic stone vaulting with ribbed arches spanning the classroom
thick stone column supporting the vaulted ceiling
warm glowing lanterns suspended from the ceiling providing ambient light
long wooden worktable with benches for potion making
brass cauldron sitting on the table with potion ingredients nearby

segments.scene_description: The camera settles into a wide stationary view of a high-ceilinged stone potions classroom illuminated by hanging lanterns. Wooden worktables with cauldrons are arranged throughout the space. A Learn Potions UI element appears briefly. Various robed students walk through the room, entering from the sides and moving between the tables, while the warm lantern light casts shadows across the stone floor and vaulted ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic dungeon corridor into the expansive warmth of a potions classroom. It begins by following a character in dark robes from behind as they navigate a narrow, dimly lit stone hallway. As the character approaches a stone archway, the camera glides forward, moving from the shadows of the corridor into a much brighter, high-ceilinged space. The scene then opens into a wide stationary view of the classroom, where hanging lanterns cast a warm glow over vaulted ceilings and wooden worktables topped with cauldrons. Finally, the perspective settles as robed students drift between the tables and a Learn Potions UI element briefly appears on the screen.
